reviews.review_title: Things you should add to this game
reviews.review_description:
I love this game but there are some things that NEED to be added, one of those is a multiplayer mode w/ a bigger arena, also a more understandable upgrade system, also reduced recoils when firing ARs one handed, finally you should make blueprints drop after every boss fight instead of just dropping randomly. And a dungeon or something like that 


Please consider my ideas Devs

Fuecoco42
There is cheese in cheeseburger
Add melees
I love it but it really needs multiplayer

I played for about 7 hours straight... made it to wave (i dont even know i lost count. 7 hours of waves) but when i backed out to the main menu. Nothing saved. Which im not sure if thats an actual feature, but please allow people to back out and then resume from there position.
I want to play this in co-op mode with my friends.
Honestly love the game, would give 5 stars.But I would love to play with a friend and fight together, and I'm probably not the only one who thinks this. so please add multiplayer

the angle of the pistol I shoot far above zombies heads and I know I am arming at them but the angle of the gun is too high can and plus the ammo count is on the top of the gun so I can see any thing to arm at. I like the game but need more adjustments
Had fun playing and killing zombies and winning matches

Great game I have had a blast playing but couldn't give it the 5 star yet because of some clunky mechanics that I would love to see fixed soon.
Defiantly worth the money give it a try
Devs asked for examples so:
The long distance grab is quite hard to begin and it sometimes just stops halfway through 
When trying to grab something from hip holster it always takes about 10 try’s for the gun to actually stay in your hand
Trying to take pills takes a few try’s for the health affects to happen
The crowbar mostly just doesn’t do anything 
It is soooo hard to put up the auto turret
This isn’t a mechanic but those flying robot things are WAY to op and I always end up dying to them
When picking up the meat and crystals they sometimes randomly fall out of my hand
I don’t know if it’s a glitch but all the heavy guns just bends sideways
I’ll add more of these when I experience them

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your feedback, we value a lot our players opinion. Can you detail a bit more the clunky mechanics that were bad ? What we can improve ? Any suggestion about other things to add (new content) ? Thanks again for your feedback !

Good physics, satisfying melee, lots of guns and abilities and some extra stuff to do apart from the arena. 
Game is lots of fun, reccomend especially cuz its free

It’s so good it makes you practice for an actual raid of zombies

reviews.review_title: A zombie arena killing fun fest!
reviews.review_description:
The premise is simple and doesn't really require a story. You get the idea in moments. The post apocalyptic world you're in has an overabundance of zombies. They recruit contestants to kill zombies in an arena for their entertainment and broadcast it for profits. So let's step up and take a shot and see how entertaining of a zombie killer you can be!

Graphically this game is nice. Very smooth with it's own unique blocky style that's slightly reminiscent of a more detailed minecraft. It's a charming but still slightly dark style that's simple enough to keep the game running smooth with a screen full of zombies without sacrificing too much detail. Think Gorn without the weird wobble or overly round shapes. I enjoy the color scheme and over all aesthetics of the game and think it serves it's purpose nicely for this title.

The gameplay is slow at first. The tutorial especially. You'll notice immediatly that you walk slow and there is no run. The reason for this is you will be able upgrade all of your abilities including walk speed with items you earn while killing. Even still, I will say this is my one big gripe with this game. Moving at first is like walking through mud. And you'll start at that speed every time. Turning it up a tiny notch for base speed would do a lot to retain beginning players I would think. Or add a run button that gives the slightest boost so maybe we can hit old man jog speed at the very least. That being said, the controls are smooth as butter. Like seriously. For a simple zombie arena game this game nails an accurate shot and the act of head shooting a zombie with a desert eagle is really satisfying.  The base mechanics of gun fire are really good. Reloading is arcade style, hit a button. Which is fine for a more arcade style game. I don't need realistic reload for every gun title. 

The gun noises themselves are on point. Firing off rounds, dual wielding desert eagles; is extremely rewarding. The recoil and sound is astoundingly good for a cartoony title. The intense music lends to the action with a pumping techno soundtrack that makes you wish you could move faster even more lol. All in all I have zero complaints in the sound department.

The replay value is definitely here if you're ok with restarting from round 1. It is a wave shooter after all. Every time is a little different with different weapons or boosts or drops. Then you have blueprints you can unlock. Fun little challenges that require you to do things like kill 50 zombies with only 1hp remaining with double barreled shotguns. Blueprints also drop from random zombie kills so you'll have a new weapon to try next run through. If you like arcade style wave shooters....this game has your replay value covered.

This is a surprisingly great title. I've found myself saying one more run, quite a few times. The voice acting lends charm and humor and the concept is sound and builds fun wave after wave. My only complaint is the walk speed. I hope they turn it up a tiny percent to feel more natural or add a run button. It really leaves a unimpressive feeling about the hero we control. That being said, after you upgrade their speed once, it's virtually perfect. You forget about it quickly and normally don't notice because you're having a blast. It's certainly not a game breaker and you'd be missing one of the best wave shooters I've played for VR. GET THIS GAME!
This is awesome but can you add holstering melees
I wish it was easier to grab guns out of there holster
